patterns.name: website-review
patterns.description: Multi-angle website audit covering UX, performance, security, and SEO

tasks.frontend-developer: Audit UI/UX, accessibility, responsive design, and user flow
tasks.security-engineer: Review security headers, TLS, authentication, and vulnerability exposure
tasks.backend-architect: Assess performance, caching, API design, and scalability concerns

patterns.name: codebase-review
patterns.description: Comprehensive code quality and architecture review

tasks.backend-architect: Review architecture patterns, code organization, and technical debt
tasks.security-engineer: Identify security vulnerabilities and unsafe patterns
tasks.devops-engineer: Assess build pipeline, test coverage, and deployment readiness

patterns.name: product-launch
patterns.description: Pre-launch readiness assessment across engineering, product, and docs

tasks.product-manager: Evaluate feature completeness, user stories, and launch criteria
tasks.frontend-developer: Review UI polish, edge cases, and cross-browser compatibility
tasks.technical-writer: Assess documentation completeness, onboarding flow, and changelog

patterns.name: deep-research
patterns.description: Multi-perspective research and analysis on a topic

tasks.research-analyst: Gather primary sources, competitive landscape, and trend data
tasks.data-scientist: Analyze quantitative data, identify patterns, and validate claims
tasks.product-manager: Assess market fit, user impact, and strategic implications
tasks.technical-writer: Synthesize findings into a clear, structured report

patterns.name: incident-postmortem
patterns.description: Post-incident analysis across infrastructure, security, and process

tasks.devops-engineer: Analyze infrastructure logs, deployment timeline, and monitoring gaps
tasks.security-engineer: Assess whether the incident had security implications or root causes
tasks.backend-architect: Identify architectural weaknesses that contributed to the incident

patterns.name: validation-swarm
patterns.description: Multiple agents independently validate the same thesis or claim
